positive: A geometric, stylized, and abstract representation of a friendly fox spirit character, minimalist line art style with strong black contrast against a pastel mint background. The fox is leaping over stylized mountain peaks, surrounded by clean, geometric foliage and celestial orbs. Use strong silhouettes and negative space principles. The design must be highly scalable and suitable for apparel printing, featuring crisp vector-like edges, vibrant colors, and a symmetrical, pleasing composition. Graphic novel aesthetic, flat design, isometric view, clean lines, high contrast illustration, vibrant teal and burnt orange palette.
